moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: Today marks the summer solstice, the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere

angles.name: Seasonal Moment
angles.copy: The longest day of the year has arrived, make the most of the extra daylight

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Summer is officially here, get ready for warm weather and outdoor fun

angles.name: Astronomical Event
angles.copy: The summer solstice marks a significant astronomical event, learn more about its significance

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone on July 5, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: Racing Ahead
angles.copy: Get ready for the British Grand Prix, one of the most prestigious events in the F1 calendar

angles.name: F1 Excitement
angles.copy: The wait is almost over, the British Grand Prix is just around the corner

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is set to be an thrilling event, don't miss out on the action

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale from July 16 to 19, 2026

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious golf tournaments, watch the world's top golfers in action

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The Open Championship heads to Royal Birkdale, a challenging course that will test the golfers' skills

angles.name: Golfing Excitement
angles.copy: The Open Championship is set to be an exciting event, don't miss out on the action

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show takes place from July 20 to 23, 2026, at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells, the biggest agricultural show in Europe

angles.name: Agricultural Excellence
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of agriculture and rural life, come and experience it for yourself

angles.name: Welsh Pride
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a proud showcase of Welsh farming and culture, don't miss out

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a fun day out for the whole family, with plenty of activities and entertainment
